name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.2-lite.1 enables streaming model calls by default for Opus/Claude reviewer/scorer timeout resilience.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.2-lite.1: streaming model calls enabled by default for Opus/Claude review and scoring.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.2-lite.1 is the simplified branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real file changes, real command execution, local project memory, and final decisions. Opus/Claude acts as an external reviewer/scorer for plan-review, diff-review, test-review, and final-review through the opus-reviewer Custom Agent calling multi_model_reviewer_score or multi_model_reviewer_findings. The Gemini tester workflow is intentionally removed. This release enables streaming model calls by default through the model layer, aggregating SSE responses before returning MCP tool results, and keeps MMA_MODEL_STREAMING=false as a fallback for gateways that do not support streaming.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Lite for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and final decision maker; Opus/Claude may be used for engineering gate review and scoring.
